headline: Assessing Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Analog Devices stock is on investors’ radar Analog Devices (ADI) has attracted attention after a strong year-to-date share move and reported revenue and net income figures, prompting investors to reassess what they are paying for this semiconductor stock. See our latest analysis for Analog Devices. The recent 30 day share price return of 19.85% and 90 day share price return of 24.53% suggest momentum has been building, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 87.95% points to a strong...
